generated_surfaces: No credential-bearing export artifacts were generated or persisted.
Quality and coverage reports were generated under artifacts/ and are not source behavior.
state_contracts: Default provider export is secret-free and server-redacted.
Credential-bearing export is a separate endpoint/action requiring per-request explicit confirmation.
Provider import preview is side-effect free.
Provider import commit revalidates bundle/resolutions and does not activate or transfer active/default provider state.
Conflicts default to add/rename; overwrite is explicit.
Provider bundles do not include official OAuth/login state or whole-app settings.

verification.notes: All local/non-live lanes passed; PR readiness blocked by maintainer-only live-provider-checks.

known_unknowns: Project cognition database is missing while status.json exists, so inline cognition update may be unavailable.
Live-provider checks were not run because the PR quality report marks them maintainer-only.
confidence_notes: Same-area server and desktop tests cover default redaction, import preview/commit, active-state preservation, conflict resolution, generated IDs, and confirmed secret export.
Changed-lines coverage passed at 90.15%; no coverage thresholds or baselines were lowered.
user_decisions: Preserve default secret-free export and separate high-friction credential-bearing export.
Preserve import preview/commit split and no active/default state transfer.
